name: Bernstein-Vazirani
description: Given parameters $n \ge 1$ and $s \in \{0, 1\}^n$, this benchmark uses the Bernstein–Vazirani algorithm to find $s$, using the $n$-qubit oracle $\mathcal{O}$ defined by $\mathcal{O} \ket{i} = (-1)^{(i \cdot s)} \ket{i}$ for all $i \in \{0, 1\}^n$. The algorithm is run for 1,000 shots.

metrics.fidelity: The fraction of shots resulting in the bitstring $s$.
